suggestions.match: The \b represents a word boundary, which matches:
suggestions.replacement: \b एक शब्द सीमा (word boundary) को दर्शाता है, जो मेल खाता है:
suggestions.reason: The explanation for Challenge 5 was left in English in this candidate.

suggestions.match:
- Between a word character and a non-word character
    - At the start/end of the string if there's a word character

    So /\bcat\b/ matches "cat" only when it's a complete word, not part of another word.
    - ✅ "cat" (surrounded by spaces)
    - ❌ "cats" (no boundary after "cat")
    - ❌ "category" (no boundary after "cat")

    [Learn more about word boundaries](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions/Assertions#other_assertions)
suggestions.replacement:
- एक शब्द वर्ण (word character) और गैर-शब्द वर्ण के बीच
    - स्ट्रिंग की शुरुआत/अंत में यदि वहां एक शब्द वर्ण है

    इसलिए /\bcat\b/ केवल "cat" से मेल खाता है जब वह एक पूर्ण शब्द हो, न कि किसी अन्य शब्द का हिस्सा।
    - ✅ "cat" (स्थानों/spaces से घिरा हुआ)
    - ❌ "cats" ("cat" के बाद कोई सीमा नहीं)
    - ❌ "category" ("cat" के बाद कोई सीमा नहीं)

    [शब्द सीमाओं के बारे में और जानें](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Guide/Regular_Expressions/Assertions#other_assertions)
suggestions.reason: The explanation for Challenge 5 was left in English in this candidate.

rationale: Candidate b7f4ac05fbf6aa431f9beaea3ced9a077dbf9500 provides the most natural and professional Hindi translation. It correctly uses terms like 'केस-सेंसिटिव' and 'क्वांटिफ़ायर' which are standard in technical Hindi contexts, whereas the 'current' and 'qwen' versions use awkward literal translations like 'झाड़-फूंक दावों' for 'look-around assertions'. Although b7f4ac05fbf6aa431f9beaea3ced9a077dbf9500 missed translating one explanation block (Challenge 5), its overall quality and adherence to Dan's style make it the superior choice, provided the missing translation is fixed.
